Authenticate with email and password.

Obtain new tokens using a valid refresh token.

get.description: Return the currently authenticated user's profile.

post.description: Create a new goal from raw text. Runs AI classification + question generation.

schema.title: Response Create Goal Endpoint Api Goals Post

post.description:
Submit answers to a goal's questions.

Returns next follow-up questions and readiness assessment.
The goal stays in 'questioning' status until the user triggers board generation.

get.description: List boards for the authenticated user with summary stats.

schema.description: Return boards shared with user instead of owned
schema.title: Shared

parameters.description: Return boards shared with user instead of owned

schema.title: Response List Boards Endpoint Api Boards Get

post.description: Join a board via share token.

get.description: Get a board by ID with nested tasks, dependencies, and edges.

post.description: Create or regenerate a share link for a board. Owner-only.

get.description: Get the current share link. Owner-only.
List all members of a board including the owner. Owner-only.

schema.title: Response List Members Endpoint Api Boards  Board Id  Members Get

delete.description: Remove a collaborator from the board. Owner-only.

post.description: Create a new task on a board.

patch.description: Update a task's fields. Handles status transitions with validation.

delete.description: Delete a task, its subtasks, and all dependency edges.

post.description: Create a new subtask for a task.
Generate 2-4 focused questions for decomposing a task into a sub-board.

Generate a sub-board for a task using AI (skeleton + enrichment).

Internally uses the streaming pipeline but returns a standard JSON response.

Generate a sub-board for a task using AI, streaming progress via SSE.

Returns a text/event-stream response with events:
- skeleton_ready: board_id, board_title, tasks (id, title, is_goal_node)
- task_enriched: task_id, title
- generation_complete: board_id, failed_tasks
- generation_error: error message

get.description: List all artifacts for a task.

patch.description: Update a subtask's title, completed status, or position.

post.description:
Generate a board for a goal using AI (two-step: skeleton + enrichment).

Internally uses the streaming skeleton->enrichment pipeline but returns
a standard JSON response with the fully-built board.

Generate a board for a goal using AI, streaming progress via SSE.

Returns a text/event-stream response with events:
- skeleton_ready: board_id, board_title, tasks (id, title, is_goal_node)
- task_enriched: task_id, title
- generation_complete: board_id, failed_tasks
- generation_error: error message

Accepts goals in 'questioning', 'answered', or 'generating' status.
The 'questioning' status supports the iterative question flow where the
user can generate a board at any point. The 'generating' case handles
reconnection when a previous SSE connection was dropped (e.g. by browser
StrictMode or network interruption) before the backend completed.

Chat with AI about a specific task.

The AI can use tools to read board state, mutate tasks (with confirmation
for destructive actions), and search the web. Returns tool action results
alongside the natural-language response.
Generate an AI action for a single subtask (used after manual creation).
Confirm a pending AI tool action and execute it.
Reject a pending AI tool action.

Chat with AI about a board.

The AI has access to board-wide tools including structural operations
(add/remove tasks, manage dependencies, split tasks).

get.description: List user memories with optional filtering and semantic search.

delete.description: Bulk soft-delete memories, optionally filtered by category.

schema.title: Response Bulk Delete Api Memories Delete

get.description: Get memory statistics for the current user.
Get a single memory by ID.
Get memories relevant to a specific board's goal context.

schema.title: Response Get Board Memories Api Boards  Board Id  Memories Get

get.description: List all template categories with public template counts.

schema.title: Response List Categories Endpoint Api Templates Categories Get

post.description: Extract text content from an uploaded file (PDF, DOCX, TXT, MD).
Extract text content from a URL.

Classify template input and generate initial questions.

Accepts description-based or content-based inputs. Returns classification
data, initial questions, and readiness assessment. Session state is
returned to the client for subsequent requests (no server-side session).

Submit answers to template questions and get follow-up questions.

Session state (classification, previous rounds, content) is passed in
the request body. Max 1 follow-up round (round 2) is supported.

Generate a template using AI, streaming progress via SSE.

Returns a text/event-stream response with events:
- research_started, research_progress, research_complete
- skeleton_ready: template title, tasks (id, title, depends_on, is_goal_node)
- task_enriched: task_id, description, priority, estimated_minutes, subtasks
- generation_complete: template title, failed_tasks
- generation_error: error message
Generate a template DAG from text content using AI (legacy).

Save a generated (and optionally edited) template.

Accepts the full edited template structure including tasks with
priority, estimated_minutes, and modified dependencies from the
DAG editor. Optionally creates a board from the saved template.
Create a template from an existing board.

get.description: List templates with filtering, search, and pagination.
Get template detail with tasks, subtasks, and edges.

put.description:
Replace the entire task structure of a template.

Validates ownership and DAG structure, then deletes all existing
tasks/deps/subtasks and inserts the new structure in a single transaction.

post.description: Create a new board (and goal) from a template.
